query: What are the termination clauses in this contract?
reference_answer: The contract may be terminated by either party with 30 days written notice. Immediate termination is allowed in case of breach of material obligations.

query: Are there any unlimited liability clauses?
reference_answer: Clause 8 contains an unlimited liability provision requiring the employee to bear all costs arising from negligence without any monetary cap.

query: What are the payment terms and schedule?
reference_answer: Payment is due within 30 days of invoice. Late payments attract a 2% monthly interest charge as per clause 5.
This agreement is governed by the laws of Kenya and disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Nairobi.

query: Vifungu vya usimamishaji wa mkataba ni vipi?
reference_answer: Mkataba unaweza kusimamishwa na upande wowote kwa arifa ya maandishi ya siku 30. Usimamishaji wa haraka unaruhusiwa katika kesi ya ukiukwaji wa wajibu wa msingi.

query: Je, kuna vifungu vya dhima isiyo na mipaka?
reference_answer: Kifungu cha 8 kina masharti ya dhima isiyo na mipaka inayomhitaji mwajiriwa kubeba gharama zote zinazotokana na uzembe bila kikomo chochote cha fedha.
The contract automatically renews for successive one-year terms unless notice of non-renewal is given at least 60 days before expiry.
The employee must maintain strict confidentiality of all proprietary information for a period of 5 years after contract termination.
